videos.title: HTML Links - Hyperlinks | HTML Full Course
videos.description: A comprehensive section on HTML links from the full HTML course covering absolute, relative, and anchor links.

videos.title: How to Create Links in HTML
videos.description: Brad covers everything about HTML links including targets, relative paths, and styling.

videos.title: HTML Anchor Tag Deep Dive
videos.description: Kevin explains the anchor element in depth including all attributes and best practices.

videos.title: Learn HTML Links in 6 Minutes
videos.description: Kyle simplifies the concept of HTML links with practical examples covering all major use cases.

videos.title: HTML Link Attributes Explained
videos.description: A focused tutorial on link attributes including target, rel, download, and title.

videos.title: Why you should use rel='noopener'
videos.description: Learn about the security vulnerability with target='_blank' and how rel='noopener' fixes it.
